text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Wow, I didn't expect you to actually get one.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Why're you giving it to me? I told you I don't
want it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Look, I'm not gonna put it on my bag. If you're
really fine with that, I'll take it.
